  "findings": [
    "Harness impact indicator tag has been deployed, indicating the equipment has been subjected to a fall or severe loading event."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately remove the harness from service.",
    "Tag the harness as unusable and destroy or discard it to prevent accidental reuse."
  ],
  "rationale": "Under OSHA 1926 Subpart M and 1910.140, any personal fall arrest system component subjected to an impact loading must be immediately removed from service and not used again for employee protection unless inspected and determined by a competent person to be undamaged and suitable for use. A deployed impact indicator is a clear visual cue that the harness has experienced a fall event and is no longer safe.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1926.502(d)(19)",
    "OSHA 1910.140(c)(17)"
  ]
}
